name: Smoked Hamburger Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Press hamburger meat into flat strips measuring 5 inches long by 1-1/2 inches wide and 1/4 inch thick.
2. Place one layer of hamburger strips in a dish for marinating.
3. Mix marinade ingredients together in a bowl.
4. Sprinkle the marinade over the meat, soaking it well.
5. Turn the meat over and sprinkle with more marinade.
6. Add layers of hamburger strips to the marinating dish and repeat sprinkling with marinade.
7. Pour any remaining marinade sauce over the meat.
8. Cover tightly and let marinate in the refrigerator for 6 to 12 hours, rotating the layers occasionally.
9. Place the marinated meat in a dehydrator until it is dry.
10. While the meat is drying, blot excess oil with paper towels.
